headline: Global Patient Engagement Solutions Market to Grow by $21.76 Billion Through 2030 - McKesson, Veradigm, Oracle, Athenahealth, and Health Catalyst Dominate
summary: Patient Engagement Solutions Market Patient Engagement Solutions Market Dublin, April 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Patient Engagement Solutions Market by Therapy, Functionality, End User, Unmet Need, Investment, Market Share, and Trends - Global Forecast to 2030" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.
